x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptedTechnicalValidation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authentication and syntactical and semantical validation are successful.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Received
x-enumeration-literals.description: Payment initiation has been received by the receiving agent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PartiallyAccepted
x-enumeration-literals.description: A number of transactions have been accepted, whereas another number of transactions have not yet achieved 'accepted' status.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected
x-enumeration-literals.description: Payment initiation or individual transaction included in the payment initiation has been rejected.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Payment initiation or individual transaction included in the payment initiation is pending.  Further checks and status update will be performed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptedCustomerProfile
x-enumeration-literals.description: Preceding check of technical validation was successful. Customer profile check was also successful.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptedSettlementInProcess
x-enumeration-literals.description: All preceding checks such as technical validation and customer profile were successful and therefore the payment initiation has been accepted for execution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptedSettlementCompleted
x-enumeration-literals.description: Settlement on the debtor's account has been completed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptedWithChange
x-enumeration-literals.description: Instruction is accepted but a change will be made, such as date or remittance not sent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AcceptedCreditSettlementCompleted
x-enumeration-literals.description: Settlement on the creditor's account has been completed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NoCancellationProcess
x-enumeration-literals.description: There is no cancellation process ongoing
